mechanism: If the SRF is stigmatized and underutilized (40-60% of capacity unused based on analogue facilities), the effective reserve floor is higher than models assuming full SRF utilization suggest. This means reserve scarcity manifests sooner during QT than standard models predict.
regime_dependence: Relevant during QT as reserves approach the scarcity threshold. Stigma effects are likely strongest during first activation (no precedent exists). If the SRF is never tested, the overrating is immaterial; once tested, stigma becomes self-fulfilling.
